analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights an online meeting with the ROK ambassador and praises China–ROK mutual support during COVID-19 as an example of international cooperation. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; it frames China as cooperative and supportive internationally, emphasizing mutual aid and an "excellent example of international cooperation." CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic governance. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No claims about domestic success or leadership. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
